# [network-request] Webgains

**Network name:** Webgains

**Slug:** `webgains`

**Publisher dashboard URL:** https://publishers.webgains.com/

**API documentation URL:** https://api.webgains.com/docs/

**Account requirements:** Active Webgains publisher account, per-programme
approval as today. API key generated from publisher dashboard; no separate
approval step for API access.

**Why this is useful for publishers:** UK-strong network with significant
overlap in retailer mix with Awin. Many UK publishers run both and currently
have to log in to two dashboards to reconcile. Setup story is similar enough
to Awin that an adapter should reuse most of the same patterns.
